info.name: Planning Poker Platform — Workflow Edition
info.description:
Workflow-oriented Postman collection for the Planning Poker microservices platform.

Organized by user journey — each folder is runnable as a Collection Runner sequence.

## Setup
1. Import this collection
2. Run the '01 - Setup (Auth)' folder first to register/login and auto-set the token
3. Run subsequent folders in order — variables chain automatically

## Variables
- `{{baseUrl}}` — Gateway URL (default: http://localhost:8080)
- `{{token}}` — Bearer token (auto-set by Login/Register)
- `{{refreshToken}}` — Refresh token (auto-set by Login/Register)
- `{{roomId}}` — Room UUID (auto-set by Create Room)
- `{{storyId}}` — Story UUID (auto-set by Create Story)
- `{{shortCode}}` — Room short code (auto-set by Share Link)
- `{{invitationToken}}` — Invitation token (auto-set by Invite)
- `{{userId}}` — User keycloak ID (auto-set by Login)
- `{{deckTypeId}}` — Deck type UUID (auto-set by List Deck Types)
- `{{notificationId}}` — Notification UUID (auto-set by List Notifications)
- `{{auditEntryId}}` — Audit entry ID (auto-set by List Audit Entries)

item.name: 01 - Setup (Auth)
item.description:
Authentication workflow. Run this folder first.

**Sequence:** Register → Login → Get Auth Profile → Get User Profile → Refresh Token → Logout

The Login request auto-sets `{{token}}` and `{{refreshToken}}` for all subsequent requests.

exec: console.log('Token and refreshToken set from registration');
console.log('Token set from login: userId=' + (json.user ? json.user.id : 'N/A'));

item.name: 02 - Room Management
item.description:
Room lifecycle workflow.

**Sequence:** Create Room → List Rooms → Get Room → Update Room → Delete Room

Create Room auto-sets `{{roomId}}` for all downstream workflows.

exec: // Ensure deckTypeId is set; if not, log a warning
console.warn('deckTypeId not set — run "10 - Health / List Deck Types" first to auto-populate');
// Auto-set roomId from first result if not already set

item.name: 03 - Invitations
item.description:
Invitation workflow. Requires a room to exist.

**Sequence:** Email Invite → Generate Share Link → Accept Invitation → Join by Short Code

Pre-requisite: Run '02 - Room Management / Create Room' first (but NOT Delete Room).

item.name: 04 - Story Management
item.description:
Story lifecycle workflow.

**Sequence:** Create Story → List Stories by Room → Get Story → Update Story → Reorder Stories → Delete Story

Pre-requisite: `{{roomId}}` must be set (run Create Room first).

item.name: 05 - Voting
item.description:
Full voting workflow on a story.

**Sequence:** Start Voting → Cast Vote → Finish Voting → View Results

Pre-requisite: `{{storyId}}` must be set and story must be in PENDING status.

item.name: 06 - Participants
item.description:
Room participation workflow.

**Sequence:** Join Room → List Participants → Remove Participant

Pre-requisite: `{{roomId}}` must be set.

exec: // Auto-set participantUserId from last participant if available

item.name: 07 - Notifications
item.description:
Notification workflow.

**Sequence:** Get Unread Count → List Notifications → Mark as Read → Mark All as Read

No pre-requisites beyond authentication.

exec: pm.test('All notifications marked as read', function () {

item.name: 08 - Admin
item.description:
Admin-only operations (requires ADMIN role).

**Sequence:** List Users → Get User → Update User → Deactivate User → List All Stories → Search Audit → Get Audit Entry → Get Entity History

Pre-requisite: Authenticated user must have ADMIN role in Keycloak.

exec: // Auto-set userId from second user if available (avoid self)
// 204 = success, 404 = user not found (acceptable in test scenarios)

item.name: 09 - Internal (Service-to-Service)
item.description:
Internal endpoints for service-to-service communication.

These endpoints have NO authentication (permitAll on /internal/**).
Used by services like estimation-service and notification-service to look up users and rooms.

item.name: 10 - Health & Reference Data
item.description:
Health checks and reference data endpoints.

No authentication required for actuator. Deck types require auth.

**Tip:** Run 'List Deck Types' first to auto-populate `{{deckTypeId}}` for Create Room.

exec: // Auto-set deckTypeId from first result (typically Fibonacci)
// Optionally override deckTypeId with this custom deck
